dj_text: That Pirate Bot DJ Radio — PIPE CLANG! You're welcome. From Kraftwerk - The Robots [Bardcore | Medieval version], to Unknown. Let's keep this going.
commercial_text: Hey Pirates! Last night's bard-covered robot tune got us thinking about what other wild creations we could get into with
hijack_text: {cool_dj_drop} "Welcome aboard Smooth Jazz FM from Dimension
recovery_text: The frequency is ours again. If you heard whispering from the void, ignore it.
